gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found missing persisted storage-layout binding, incomplete V1 Qwen3 release validation, unclear byte-order docs, and synthetic qwen3-v1 misuse. The slice now persists storage_layout on PackChunk/ChunkRef, validates it in workflow and engine handoff paths, enforces qwen3-v1 shared K/V storage, moves synthetic benchmarks/tests to non-Qwen layout labels, clarifies README semantics, and final GPT-5.5 review was clean.
scope: engine adapter handoff and probe validation
README model profile and adapter contract docs
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_kvpack.py tests/test_storage.py tests/test_storage_benchmark.py tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_model_profiles.py tests/test_engine.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_public_package.py -q

python -m py_compile src/restaurant_kv_serving/engine_protocol.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/engine_adapters.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/model_profiles.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/release_evidence.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/models.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/kvpack.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/workflow.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/engine.py src/restaurant_kv_serving/storage_benchmark.py src/document_kv_cache/engine_protocol.py src/document_kv_cache/model_profiles.py
what_changed: Added KVStorageLayout and storage-layout normalization to KVLayout.
Persisted storage_layout on PackChunk and ChunkRef and validated it through workflow generation and engine-ready handoff construction.
Serialized storage_layout in engine adapter/probe records and release-evidence parsing.
Enforced the V1 qwen3-v1 shared K/V storage invariant and moved synthetic benchmarks/tests to synthetic layout labels.
Exported storage-layout APIs through restaurant_kv_serving and document_kv_cache.
Updated README and tests for the storage-layout contract.
why: Make future vLLM/SGLang KV injection adapters able to reject physically incompatible cache bytes before they map chunks into native KV blocks.
